text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The climax of the spring season, the Takarazuka
Kinen, is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Let's go to the paddock, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no hesitation in Mejiro Ryan as she heads
into the second Grand Prix race of the year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: This is just like the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In Kyoto, you and I stood ahead of the pack—the
two honorable Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There's only one major difference between this
and the Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Only one? Um, and that's...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The distance? It was 3,200 meters before. Today
it's 2,200 meters.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No, there's something far greater than the
distance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell you. There's an irksome, star-like quality in
your expression now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Have you been practicing how to present yourself
true to your name?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I've never really had much confidence
before...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So I trained until I could finally believe in myself!
Until I could agree with what my trainer saw in
me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If I don't believe in myself, then it's like not
believing in the fans who chose to support me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The right effort will be rewarded... I have to try
my hardest for the people who taught me that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Today... I want to win! Not just against you—I
want to win this whole race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, then you can rest assured. If you can win
against me, then you will surely claim first place in
this race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I will tell you this though. Distance is no issue...
for a fully actualized Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's conquer or be conquered. The first Grand Prix
is beginning, and Mejiro Ryan is putting her
dreams on the line.
